scripts.test:product-cart:chrome-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium BROWSER_CHANNEL=chrome DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:chrome-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium BROWSER_CHANNEL=chrome DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:safari-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:safari-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:all-headed: npm run test:product-cart:chrome-desktop && npm run test:product-cart:chrome-mobile && npm run test:product-cart:safari-desktop && npm run test:product-cart:safari-mobile
